message:
chore(beads): sync 2ot4f progress comment after admission peer_usage cap (60921c7f)

Comment annotates the AdmissionController peer_usage unbounded-allocation
fix landed in 60921c7f. Bead reset to open since other audit findings
from prior sessions remain unpatched (RateLimitPool silent defaults,
QuarantineStore ingress wiring, audit severity classification, OAuth
state redaction) — design-level changes needing owner sign-off.
